description: Configures Google Workspace session controls, login challenges, and re-authentication requirements. Creates organizational units for tiered session management: Admin (shortest), Employee, Contractor, and Break Glass sessions. Equivalent to Okta sign-on policies.

risk_profile_effects.standard: 12-hour employee sessions, 8-hour admin sessions. Login challenges enabled. Re-auth for sensitive actions disabled.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: 8-hour employee sessions, 4-hour admin sessions. Login challenges enabled. Re-auth for sensitive actions required.
risk_profile_effects.strict: 4-hour employee sessions, 2-hour admin sessions. Login challenges enabled. Re-auth for sensitive actions required.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Your security tier. Controls default session durations and login challenge behavior.

group_ids.label: Group IDs
group_ids.client_description: Map of group names to IDs from the groups module. Required for policy targeting.

session_duration_hours.label: Employee Session Duration (hours)
session_duration_hours.client_description: How long an employee's web session lasts before re-authentication. Shorter sessions are more secure but less convenient.

admin_session_duration_hours.label: Admin Session Duration (hours)
admin_session_duration_hours.client_description: How long an admin console session lasts. Always shorter than employee sessions due to elevated privileges.

enable_login_challenge.label: Enable Login Challenges
enable_login_challenge.client_description: Whether to challenge users with additional verification when suspicious login activity is detected (new location, new device, etc.).

require_reauth_for_sensitive.label: Re-auth for Sensitive Actions
require_reauth_for_sensitive.client_description: Whether to require re-authentication when users access sensitive settings (security, app passwords, recovery options).

outputs.admin_session_ou_path: OU path for admin session policy scoping
outputs.employee_session_ou_path: OU path for employee session policy scoping
outputs.contractor_session_ou_path: OU path for contractor session policy scoping
outputs.break_glass_session_ou_path: OU path for break glass session policy scoping
